title: Shershaah
tmdbOverview: Inspired by the life of Captain Vikram Batra (PVC), the film celebrates his bravery, valiant spirit and honors his invaluable sacrifice during the Kargil War of 1999, at the age of 24.
synopsis: Released in 2021, Shershaah is a action, drama and thriller film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.3 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a UA certification (IN rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
